officialSources.title: NHS App web integration guidance
borrowedInto376: embedded webview file download and browser print assumptions require explicit handling
NHS App supplied error behavior must be mapped to patient-safe recovery instead of generic chrome
external navigation must be controlled and return-safe

officialSources.title: NHS App JavaScript v2 API specification
borrowedInto376: bridge capabilities must be tested before byte delivery or external-browser handoff
download and browser-overlay behavior must be capability-gated
later executable work needs explicit bridge-capability refs

officialSources.title: How to integrate with the NHS App - web integration
borrowedInto376: Sandpit and AOS readiness must be represented as release evidence
SCAL and clinical safety evidence must gate launch
limited release and post-live performance reporting need machine-readable policy

officialSources.title: Standards for NHS App integration
borrowedInto376: WCAG 2.2 AA must be an explicit delivery requirement
clinical safety and privacy obligations must be referenced by evidence bundles
telemetry must not collect sensitive identity or PHI-bearing query strings by default

officialSources.title: NHS service manual accessibility testing
borrowedInto376: accessibility evidence must include automated and manual testing
keyboard focus assistive-technology and content checks must be first-class coverage items
manual assistive and device-lab proof remains required before limited release

officialSources.title: Playwright accessibility testing
borrowedInto376: automated accessibility proof should be repeatable in later browser checks
automated checks are not complete proof without manual accessibility evidence
axe style checks are useful as a gate but cannot replace manual coverage

acceptedInto376: download print and external navigation are allowlist-only embedded behaviors
summary-first artifact presentation is mandatory before byte transfer or handoff
route freezes are patient-facing dispositions with support codes and safe routes
limited-release telemetry is allowlist-only and explicitly blocks JWTs access grants NHS numbers and PHI-bearing query strings
manual assistive and device-lab evidence remains a carry-forward blocker before limited NHS App release
SCAL clinical-safety and rollback rehearsal evidence remains a launch or widening blocker

rejectedOrDeferredClaims.claim: desktop browser downloads and window.print can be relied on inside the NHS App webview
rejectedOrDeferredClaims.reason: the embedded contract must test bridge capability first and select governed download secure-send-later or safe handoff

rejectedOrDeferredClaims.claim: a route freeze can fall through to a generic error page
rejectedOrDeferredClaims.reason: each freeze maps to RouteFreezeDisposition and EmbeddedErrorContract copy

rejectedOrDeferredClaims.claim: NHS-App-only degraded copy may soften or hide the shared degraded truth
rejectedOrDeferredClaims.reason: copy may be shorter but cannot widen actionability or hide stricter state

rejectedOrDeferredClaims.claim: automated Playwright and axe checks are enough for limited release
rejectedOrDeferredClaims.reason: automated checks are required but manual assistive and physical device proof are still blockers

rejectedOrDeferredClaims.claim: raw JWTs grant tokens NHS numbers or PHI-bearing query strings can be logged for proof
rejectedOrDeferredClaims.reason: telemetry fields are allowlisted and prohibited fields are blocked by default

rejectedOrDeferredClaims.claim: SCAL and production approval are already complete
rejectedOrDeferredClaims.reason: 376 records evidence contract shape only and carries forward signoff as a gate
